reasoning: Based on recent information, there is currently no approved vaccine for Calicivirus (Norovirus and Sapovirus) as of late 2025. HilleVax's vaccine failed a mid-stage trial in July 2024. Moderna's Phase 3 vaccine trial for Norovirus experienced delays due to a lack of cases, pushing its case accumulation into the 2025-2026 Northern Hemisphere season; efficacy data won't be ready until 2026, and certainly no approval will be granted before the final resolution date of February 2026. Vaxart is only moving into Phase 2b in 2025. Given the lengthy regulatory review process (usually 6-12 months post Phase 3), there is virtually no chance a Norovirus vaccine will be developed and approved by February 2026. Setting the probability to the minimum allowed value for all dates.
